       "S",

=_xlfn.LET(

    _xlpm.embarcador,ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Embarcador]],
    _xlpm.destinatario,ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Destinatário]],
    _xlpm.provedor,ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Provedor]],
    _xlpm.porto,ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Porto]],
    _xlpm.produto,ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Produto]],
    _xlpm.clientePorto,ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Cliente Proposta+PortoExc]],
    _xlpm.embCliProv,ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Embarcador+Cliente Proposta+ProvedorExc]],
    _xlpm.es...
=ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Cliente Proposta]] & ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Centro de Custo]]
=ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Embarcador]] & ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Cliente Proposta]] & ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Provedor]]
=ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Cliente Proposta]] & ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Nome local de atendimento]]
